meta.purpose: Capability stages, practice loops, and measurable indicators.
meta.load_condition: Load for learning, team standards, audits, or progressive quality improvement.

capability_layers.name: Prompt-to-output
indicators: agent generates working animation from a prompt

capability_layers.name: Brief-and-review pipeline
indicators: agent always produces a brief before code
assumptions are explicitly stated and reviewed
human review gates are enforced before expansion
revision deltas are logged and traceable

capability_layers.name: Taste-calibrated automation
indicators: agent internalizes brand motion grammar after 3-5 review cycles
brief template is brand-specific and reuseable
quality signals are captured per revision and improve agent output over time
human review shifts from direction to approval only

practice_loop: write a structured brief before generating
get human feedback on each beat (keep / adjust / replace)
